name: Jalapeno-Yeast-Corn Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3 Jalapeno peppers, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the tofu, sugar, and shortening.
2. Add the baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cream of tartar to the mixture. Mix well until combined.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (jalapeno peppers, cornmeal, flour, nutritional yeast, and water) to the bowl. Stir until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
4. Spoon the batter into lightly oiled muffin pans.
5. Bake in an oven preheated to 375°F for about 30 minutes. Test with a skewer to check if they are done. If not done, return to the oven and test every 5 minutes.
6. Cool on wire racks.
